topics.name: 100 Level: EBSU Science & Computing Foundation
topics.description: CSC 101, CSC 102, MAT 101, PHY 101, and GST 101 courses at EBSU Abakaliki.

subtopics.name: CSC 101: Introduction to Computer Science (EBSU)
objectives: Understand history of computing, computer hardware architectures, and operating systems
Solve basic mathematical and logical problems using Python algorithms

subtopics.name: MAT 101 & PHY 101: Algebra and Physics for Computing
objectives: Apply set theory, matrices, calculus, and electricity/magnetism in computer science

topics.name: 200 Level: EBSU Core Programming & Digital Logic
topics.description: CSC 201 Object-Oriented Programming, Discrete Structures, and Data Structures I.

subtopics.name: CSC 201: OOP using C++ / Java (EBSU)
objectives: Implement OOP encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and exception handling in Java

subtopics.name: CSC 202: Data Structures & Assembly Language
objectives: Implement arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, and 8086 assembly language

topics.name: 300 - 400 Level: EBSU Advanced Computing, SIWES, and B.Sc. Project
topics.description: DBMS, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, SIWES, and EBSU Thesis.

subtopics.name: CSC 301 & CSC 302: Database Systems and SIWES
objectives: Design relational SQL databases using ER diagrams and normalization
Complete 6 months industrial training at tech hubs/organizations and present defense

subtopics.name: CSC 401 & CSC 499: Artificial Intelligence and B.Sc. Research Project
objectives: Implement machine learning algorithms, computer vision, and defend original EBSU thesis
